markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare for an upcoming podcast recording with Anna Baird to explore her diverse executive experience across tech companies.](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Anna Baird has an extensive background spanning KPMG (17+ years), McAfee, Outreach (scaling from $25M to $240M), and now serves on boards and as a venture partner at Madrona](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [The podcast will focus on the "messy middle" of leadership journeys rather than just outcomes, with topics including focus/decision-making, leadership transitions, and adapting to different growth stages](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Recording is scheduled for September 4th with opportunities to cover Anna's diverse experiences in marketing, sales, operations, and executive leadership](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Potential angles include: how to identify and develop effective leaders, navigating rapid growth phases, and adapting to AI-driven market shifts](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

## Topics

### Anna's Background and Career Journey

  - [Started at KPMG for 17.5 years in Silicon Valley tech, becoming partner and working with Google pre-IPO](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Transitioned to McAfee as SVP, then to startups as CFO, COO and eventually CRO at Outreach](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Scaled Outreach from $25M to $240M between 2018-2022](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Currently serves on boards of SEMrush (public marketing company) and SeatGeek](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Works as venture partner at Madrona helping executives build businesses and avoid mistakes](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### Podcast Format and Purpose

  - [Focuses on the "messy middle" of growth journeys rather than just end results or exits](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Targets marketing leaders and founder-led marketing audiences](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Previous guests include founders and advisors to unicorn companies](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Production involves multi-angle shooting with flexibility to craft narrative from recorded content](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Currently only two episodes in but already featuring high-profile guests](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

### Leadership Focus and Decision-Making

  - [Critical importance of saying "no" to opportunities that cause distraction](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Challenge of evaluating enterprise deals that might drain resources despite being good logos](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Need to evaluate potential initiatives against the 80/20 rule - will it benefit most customers?](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Importance of evaluating what to focus on and what to deliberately avoid during growth phases](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

### Enterprise Sales Challenges

  - [Large companies struggle with moving quickly due to procurement processes](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Mutual action-based close plans can help navigate enterprise bureaucracy](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Need to engage all stakeholders (IT, security, CFO) early in the process](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Budget owners need power to push things through internal mechanisms](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### Leadership Transitions During Growth

  - [Fast-growing companies need leadership changes approximately every three years](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Leaders who excel at one stage may hit walls at the next stage of growth](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Companies growing 50-100%+ hit these transition points faster than those growing 15-20%](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Importance of "hire slow, fire fast" - when something feels off, it usually is](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)

### Qualities to Look for in Leaders

  - [Intellectual curiosity and willingness to take risks are crucial attributes](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Value candidates with diverse backgrounds who have reinvented themselves](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Best hires are often those who can adapt to completely different challenges](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Strong leaders take initiative to fix broken systems without fear of failure](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule podcast recording for September 4th when Anna will be in town](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Marcel to connect Anna with Eugene Levin (SEMrush President)](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Team to prepare documentation with potential podcast topics/angles](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Potentially discuss AI's impact on marketing and GTM roles during the recording](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Allow time before recording to further discuss and refine topics/direction](https://fathom.video/share/6BUtxy7sGXsPx4iLh6Wy388JLzuU1K-7?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
